title: ESSENTIAL NEEDS - 211info
text: AGAPE HOUSE ESSENTIAL NEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, blankets, and household goods depending on availability. Shower facilities also available. Donations accepted. 500 West Harper Road Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm, Friday 9am-noon Showers: Tuesday-Thursday 9am-11:30am and 1pm-2:30pm, Friday 9am-11:30am Email (541) 567-8774 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-8774 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in and check in at front desk FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address, photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Boardman, Echo, Hermiston, Irrigon, Stanfield, and Umatilla Services: Bedding/Linen General Clothing Provision Public Showers/Baths Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - EMERGENCY FOOD BOX PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AGAPE HOUSE
